tool.name: OGS: AddFaultToVoxelGrid
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'AddFaultToVoxelGrid'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $fault: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for #for $m in $input: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for addfaulttovoxelgrid --material '$material' #for $m in $fault: --fault "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for #for $m in $input: --input "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output output_1.vtu

param.name: material
param.label: material
param.help: material id for cells intersected by fault, (min = 0)

param.name: input
param.label: input
param.help: Input (.vtu). the input file containing the paths the all input in correct order from top to bottom

tool.help: This tool runs the **AddFaultToVoxelGrid** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
